programs.title: Kingdom of Heaven
programs.desc: 12th century.The young blacksmith Balian (Orlando Bloom) loses his entire family in tragic circumstances.He begins to doubt the existence of God.Then he is visited by the crusader Godfrey of Ibelin (Liam Neeson), who turns out to be his father.He suggests his son learn knightly crafts.One day, Balian kills a priest in a fight.He must escape.Together with Godfrey, he sets off for Jerusalem.On the way, his father is killed by the bishop's men.Prudent King Baldwin IV (Edward Norton) and his advisor Tiberias (Jeremy Irons) strive for peaceful solutions.Thanks to them, there are no hostilities in Jerusalem.They even manage to reach a truce with the leader of the Muslims, Saladin (Ghassan Massoud).However, the ruler's conciliatory policy does not please some greedy and fanatical crusaders.Meanwhile, Balian falls in love with the king's sister, the already married princess Sibyl (Eva Green).The girl does not love her husband, Baron Guy de Lusignan (Marton Csokas).Soon the Crusaders start a war with the Muslims.

programs.title: Anaconda
programs.desc: Doug (Jack Black) and Griff (Paul Rudd) have been friends since childhood.They have always dreamed of making a remake of their favorite film, the horror film "Anaconda".When both buddies experience a midlife crisis, they decide not to wait any longer and set off together deep into the Amazon to start filming.The situation becomes more complicated when... a real giant anaconda appears on the film set, spreading chaos and destruction around.Despite the deadly threat, the friends decide to take advantage of the predator's presence.

programs.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programs.desc: Brave Po opens a new chapter in his life - he is to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.He's trying to get used to his new role.In addition, the voracious bear must find a daredevil who will replace him as the Dragon Warrior.Not everything goes according to plan.This time, China's security is threatened by Chameleon, who wields black magic and can take on any form and take over the abilities of old masters.With the help of a smart vixen and former thief, Zhen, the panda bear must face her.But they need allies to defeat the shape-shifting witch and the sinister army behind her.The time of a merciless fight is inevitably approaching... The voices of the characters include, among others:Marcin Hycnar, Jan Peszek, Wiktor Zborowski and Julia Chatys.

programs.title: Euphoria
programs.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programs.title: Peacemaker 2
programs.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programs.title: G20
programs.desc: During the G20 summit, the leaders of the world's influential countries become the targets of terrorists.US President Danielle Sutton (Viola Davis) miraculously manages to escape the attackers.She must face the enemy alone.

actor: Prime Minister Oliver Everett - Douglas Hodge
Treasury Secretary Joanna Worth - Elizabeth Marvel
